channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Joe Jonas on What Makes the Perfect Coachella Day Party, From Kid Cudi on the Playlist to an Aperol Spritz in Hand
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest trends and happenings. Today, we're talking about Coachella and a special appearance by Joe Jonas.
Joe Jonas, one of the famous Jonas Brothers, has a favorite drink - the Aperol Spritz. Recently, Aperol returned to Coachella for its fourth year, and this time, they threw a party, dubbed the Aperol Day Club. This free festival activation featured live DJ sets, beauty salons, immersive installations, and of course, Aperol-forward drinks.
[Music transition]
Host: To celebrate the launch of the club, Aperol enlisted Joe Jonas to help throw an exclusive surprise party. In an interview, Joe shared that he's been a fan of Aperol for years and was excited to partner with them. He even prepared a special playlist for the occasion, which included Kid Cudi's "Pursuit of Happiness" remix from Project X.
[Music clip: Kid Cudi's "Pursuit of Happiness" remix]
Host: According to Joe, the key to a successful party includes a good host, good drinks - preferably Aperol Spritz, good music, good lighting, and good vibes. As he hosted the event at the Aperol Day Club, Joe aimed to create an unforgettable experience for his guests.
[Music transition]
Host: Joe's goal was for attendees to leave the party on Monday morning, remembering the highlight of their weekend as sharing a drink with him. With his passion for Aperol and party hosting, it's likely that Joe's party was an unforgettable experience for all who attended.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next episode.
